text.title: Structured Output — Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: design schema → pick provider mode → wire parse+repair → eval schema coverage → ship.

step.name: design-schema
step.input: downstream consumer code OR API spec
step.action: Define Pydantic model OR JSON Schema. Flatten any recursion into parent-id arrays. Decide strictness (extra fields forbidden? unknown enum values?).
step.decision-gate: If recursive type detected — flatten before continuing (r5-no-recursive-schemas).

step.name: pick-provider-mode
step.action: OpenAI 4o+ → response_format=json_schema. Anthropic → tool-use JSON. Gemini 2+ → schema response. Mistral → function_call. Pin provider version (constrained decoding behaviour can shift).
step.decision-gate: If provider doesn't support structured output AND can't switch — STOP; manual JSON-prompting fails 5-15% (r1-provider-native-first).

step.name: wire-parse-and-repair
step.action: Call provider with schema. Parse result. On parse failure, retry once with schema + error attached. On second failure, log raw + raise.
step.decision-gate: If retry count >1 detected — fix; only one repair allowed (r3-repair-once).

step.name: eval-coverage
step.action: Run safe-parse on all samples. Compute (a) first-call parse rate, (b) repair-success rate, (c) raw-log rate. Target: first-call ≥95%, total success ≥99%.
step.decision-gate: If total success <95% — refine schema OR switch provider; current setup unreliable.

step.name: ship-with-monitoring
step.action: Roll out at 10% → 50% → 100%. Monitor: parse_fail rate, repair rate, raw-log volume. Alert if parse_fail > 2% sustained.
step.decision-gate: If parse_fail spike — check schema drift (fm-03) or provider regression first.
